creator: feh@fehcom.de
text:
(In reply to Olivier Certner from comment #43)


Sorry for not being clear here:

1. After you asked me to go for the drm-61-kmod, I downloaded the current port hierarchy ('portsnap').
2. On this PC, no old or previous copies of /urs/ports/* sources where installed.
3. Therefore, I did/could not build drm-515-kmod from any other sources except the one I reported 'failure' for. 

Sorry. Your are haunting a ghost here.

However; if *additionally* steps are required to set up a clean environment, let my know. 

--eh.
